NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

This Non-Disclosure Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of this 15th day of October, 2023, by and between Dr. Tan Wei Ming, NRIC: S2345678B, residing at 12 Maxwell Road, Singapore 069120, and Siti Aishah binti Abdullah, NRIC: S8765432C, of TechVision Pte Ltd, UEN: 200912345Z, with its principal place of business at 88 Anson Road, Singapore 079907. For the purposes of this Agreement, the parties agree as follows:

1. CONFIDENTIAL INFORMATION. For the purpose of this Agreement, "Confidential Information" shall mean any data, project status reports, financial information, or other proprietary information disclosed by one party to the other in writing, orally, or in any other form. Notably, the details of the project plan are not considered Confidential Information if already publicly available.

2. OBLIGATIONS OF THE PARTIES. Each party agrees not to disclose or use any Confidential Information for any purpose other than the specific business discussions regarding the potential Sale and Purchase Agreement ("SPA"). The parties shall not make any copies or reproductions of the Confidential Information without the prior written consent of the other party. The SPA discussions shall be kept confidential in any external communications.

For further correspondence, please contact Dr. Tan Wei Ming at +65 6123 4567 or via email at tanwm@fictionmail.sg, and Siti Aishah at +65 6789 0123 or via email at siti.aishah@techvision.sg. Further details can be accessed on https://example.sg/user/S2345678B.

IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties hereto have executed this Agreement as of the date first above written.
